languages.text: {n}Обезображенное аугментами лицо Себериана бледнеет, однако его голос звучит на удивление ровно, когда он отдает приказ.{/n} "Стража! Во дворец пробрался шпион! Расстрелять!"
{n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"
languages.original_text: {n}Обезображенное аугментами лицо Себериана бледнеет, однако его голос звучит на удивление ровно, когда он отдает приказ.{/n} "Стража! Во дворец пробрался шпион! Расстрелять!"

{n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安那张因植入物而损毁的脸血色尽褪，可下达命令时，他的声音却异常平稳：{/n}“卫兵！有间谍混入宫中！开火！”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安那张因植入物而损毁的脸血色尽褪，可下达命令时，他的声音却异常平稳：{/n}“卫兵！有间谍混入宫中！开火！”

languages.text: {n}Le visage défiguré par les implants de votre vis-à-vis blêmit subitement, mais sa voix reste étonnamment ferme lorsqu'il aboie ses ordres :{/n} « Gardes ! {mf|Un espion s'est introduit|Une espionne s'est introduite} dans le palais ! Feu à volonté ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage défiguré par les implants de votre vis-à-vis blêmit subitement, mais sa voix reste étonnamment ferme lorsqu'il aboie ses ordres :{/n} « Gardes ! {mf|Un espion s'est introduit|Une espionne s'est introduite} dans le palais ! Feu à volonté ! »

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın ogmentlerle şekli bozulmuş yüzü solsa da sesi, emri verirken şaşırtıcı derecede istikrarlı çıkıyor.{/n} "Muhafızlar! Saraya sızan bir casus var! Vurun!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın ogmentlerle şekli bozulmuş yüzü solsa da sesi, emri verirken şaşırtıcı derecede istikrarlı çıkıyor.{/n} "Muhafızlar! Saraya sızan bir casus var! Vurun!"

languages.text: {n}La cara de Seberian, desfigurada por los aumentos, palidece, pero su voz es firme cuando da la orden:{/n} «¡Guardias! ¡Hay un{mf||a} espía en el palacio! ¡Fuego!».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La cara de Seberian, desfigurada por los aumentos, palidece, pero su voz es firme cuando da la orden:{/n} «¡Guardias! ¡Hay un{mf||a} espía en el palacio! ¡Fuego!».

languages.text: {n}Aus Seberians von Augmentationen entstelltem Gesicht weicht jede Farbe, aber seine Stimme klingt erstaunlich fest, als er den Befehl erteilt:{/n} "Wachen! {mf|Ein Spion|Eine Spionin} ist in den Palast eingedrungen! Eröffnet das Feuer!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus Seberians von Augmentationen entstelltem Gesicht weicht jede Farbe, aber seine Stimme klingt erstaunlich fest, als er den Befehl erteilt:{/n} "Wachen!" {mf|Ein Spion|Eine Spionin} ist in den Palast eingedrungen! Eröffnet das Feuer!"

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの顔は青ざめ、だが彼の声は驚くほど落ち着いて、命令を下す。{/n}「衛兵！宮殿にスパイが潜入した！発砲せよ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの顔は青ざめ、だが彼の声は驚くほど落ち着いて、命令を下す。{/n}「衛兵！宮殿にスパイが潜入した！発砲せよ！」
